name: io.github.nirholas/agenc-mcp
title: three.ws AgenC
description: Browse the AgenC on-chain task marketplace, query the agent registry, and link identities.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the AgenC bridge endpoints (/api/agenc/*). Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live AgenC reads (the bridge fans out to a Solana RPC to scan task/agent PDAs).
